motto: "His virtue was silvern."

motto: "His gait is as one in special haste."

motto: "Why here is love's tame madness"

motto: "His stature is thus magnified."

motto: "He was a man more sinned against than sinning."

name: BRANDT LABOON
motto: "It is not good that man should be alone."

motto: "Hold! thou curly pate!"

motto: "Thou art so exceptional still."

name: CHARLES NAPIER
motto: "For eating, not for talking, is my mouth."

name: Jno. M. Walker
description: Deep-versed in books but shallow in himself.

name: A. R. MacDonell
description: His life was gentle and other things so mixed in him that all might ask what have we here.

name: Dan McDougald
description: He came, he saw, he would have conquered, but—

name: Lucile Wisdom
description: O tempora! O mores! Why was it sent among us.

name: Fred Allen
description: The last of the Allens. Proud race of loiterers.

name: J. J. Memory Payne
description: The hoary-locked sage from Royston.

name: The Moises
description: Two little boys. In truth they meant no harm.

name: Wallace Wright
description: After so many years, at last, we murmur "Au revoir."

name: Van Wyck
description: Just let him be.

name: Wadley
description: The worst of his class, hopeless.

name: J. P. Jones
description: An example of unheeded hot air.

name: Gus Sparks
description: Not dignified, just dull.

name: Tom Abbot
description: Here is a modest little boy. His mamma's pride, his papa's joy.

name: Dan Redfearn
description: Like a camp-follower, still he lingers. Like a sponge, he takes it in.

name: W. Falk
description: Though you call him thief or rascal, he was never known to take offence.

name: Turpin
description: How pleased is every palfrey elf, To talk about one thing—himself.

name: Boykin Wright
description: A self-styled transcendent genius.

name: J. D. Willingham
description: One of those who do good by stealth and blush to find it fame.

name: Sam Dick
description: Poor boy. He's but the shadow of his former self.

name: W. LeCraw
description: Wise in his own conceit.

name: Henry Newman
description: Divinely tall and most divinely fair.

name: Hawkins
description: More to be pitied than scorned.

name: Blackshear
description: His stars did not move to please him.

name: Cumming
description: Solid as a rock with some parts solid bone.

name: Lanham
description: Too gentle for much use.

name: Reynolds
description: O Notoriety! O Notoriety! how many crimes have I committed in thy name?

name: Miller
description: An adept at unrivaled self-devotion.

name: E. S. Taylor
description: Let us stop at this.

name: Tilley
description: He was bending over a corpse, examining it minutely with a magnifying glass, looking for yellow spots.

name: Townsend
description: He sighed and noted that they change the body every night and he doesn't know the difference.

name: Blackshear
description: He is confined in a cage full of dogs, but he growls and snaps at them with such viciousness that they are pretty well intimidated now.

name: Traylor
description: He was locked in a death struggle with a terrible beast that somewhat resembled an octopus.

name: Forehand
description: He is gesticulating and bowing to an imaginary audience, nominating Bryan for President.

name: Andrews
description: He looks like a dentist and is picking the gold out of a client's teeth to collect his fee because the client is insolvent.

name: Peck
description: He squeezes a dollar until the eagle screams.

name: York
description: He is being given a drubbing by a monster that's slapping and striking him with much vim.

name: Weeks
description: He was clad in a striped suit and wielded with precision a ponderous sledge, picking sermons out of stones.

name: ROBERT COOPER DAVIS.
motto: "Worms, doctor, worms, and so we are."

name: EUGENE KICKLIGHTER DeLOACH.
